title: ADK-403: Custom A2UI Component Development
author: Google Cloud
description: Build and register bespoke client-side React widgets and charts that compile into sandboxed A2UI rendering frames.

features.title: React Extensions
features.description: Author custom React UI templates using strict JSON Schema properties to accept variables from agents.

features.title: Data Charting
features.description: Integrate visualization charting libraries to represent compound table columns graphically.

features.title: Event Callbacks
features.description: Define custom callback parameters to send user interaction variables back to the active agent run.
